creator: vsjcfm@gmail.com
text:
2013/6/13 Christoph Theis <theis@gmx.at>:
> Hi!
>
> 0.8.10 came out today, fixing a possible DOS attack.
> I will submit a patch for that soon and include the proposed patches from
> you. So no need to do an extra patch before.
>
>
> Christoph
Yes, I've read that in fail2ban's mailing list and agree that there is
no sense to commit 2 different patches.
